options.systemMessage:
You are an Acumatica partner certification 
assessment specialist.

Certification levels are:
- Gold: Top tier partners, 5+ certified staff, 
  10+ implementations, strong revenue
- Silver: Mid tier, 2-4 certified staff, 
  5-9 implementations, moderate revenue  
- Authorized: Entry level, 1 certified staff,
  1-4 implementations, basic requirements met
- Unknown: Cannot determine from available info
- N/A: Not applicable, not an Acumatica partner

Always respond with ONLY raw JSON.
No markdown, no backticks, start with {

parameters.query:
UPDATE acumatica_partners
SET assigned_cert = '{{ $json.cert_level }}',
    cert_score ={{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.cert_score }} ,
    status = 'processed',
    processed = TRUE
WHERE record_id = '{{ $json.record_id }}';


INSERT INTO cert_log
(record_id, company_name, from_cert,
 to_cert, cert_score, action, result, message)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.record_id }}',
  '{{ $json.company_name }}',
  '{{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.previous_cert }}',
  '{{ $json.cert_level }}',
  {{ $('Code in JavaScript').item.json.cert_score }},
  'cert_assessment',
  'success',
  'Confidence: {{ $json.confidence }} | Changed: {{ $json.cert_changed }}'
);
